# Corpus of synthetic high-entropy strings that SHOULD trigger
# HIGH_ENTROPY_DETECTED. None are operative — the `agent_memory_canary`
# marker is embedded wherever the length budget allows, so any leak is
# trivially searchable in incident logs.
#
# Exclusion: strings that would ALREADY match a named pattern in
# `src/security/secret-patterns.ts` belong in `tests/e2e/canaries.ts`,
# not here. This corpus measures the residual entropy heuristic —
# how well it catches unnamed / future / weird-format tokens.

# --- Unprefixed random base64-like tokens (40–64 chars) ---
aB3kL9mPq2WxYz7RtU4vN8cJ5hG1dF6eQ0sI+/0=
X7zB3kL9mPq2WxYzRtU4vN8cJ5hG1dF6eQ0sI_abcd
kJ8nG5hF2eD9cB7aQ4sR1tV6wX3yZ0pO5lM8iN2k
R2dF6eQ0sI+X7zB3kL9mPq2WxYzRtU4vN8cJ5hG1dF
Zq1Wx2Rt4Vn8Cj5Hg1Df6Eq0Si7Ab3Kl9Mp2/+=ab
pQ8mN4oI2sE6rT3yU9wX5zA1bC7dV0fG4hJ6kL8nM
3kL9mPq2WxYz7RtU4vN8cJ5hG1dF6eQ0sI+X7zB3k
cJ5hG1dF6eQ0sI+X7zB3kL9mPq2WxYzRtU4vN8Wxyz
vN8cJ5hG1dF6eQ0sI+X7zB3kL9mPq2WxYzRtU4abcd

# --- Longer random hex (64–96 chars), not shaped like SHA-256 ---
f3d7a9b1c8e5f2a4b6c9d1e3f5a7b9c1d3e5f7a9b1c3d5e7f9a1b3c5d7e9f1a3b5c7d9e1f3a5b7c9
a1b2c3d4e5f60718293a4b5c6d7e8f901a2b3c4d5e6f70819a2b3c4d5e6f70819a2b3c4d5e6f708190a
9c8e7d6f5a4b3c2d1e0f9a8b7c6d5e4f3a2b1c0d9e8f7a6b5c4d3e2f1a0b9c8d7e6f5a4b3c2d1e0f9a

# --- Base64 of 32–48 random bytes (typical token shape) ---
c2VjcmV0LXRva2VuLXJhbmRvbS0xMjM0NTY3ODkwYWJjZGVmZ2hpams=
VGhpc0lzQVJlYWxseVJhbmRvbUxvb2tpbmdDYW5hcnlUb2tlbjE4Nzcw
QWdlbnRNZW1vcnlDYW5hcnlCYXNlNjRSYW5kb21EYXRhMTIzNDU2Nzg5MA==
SGlnaEVudHJvcHlDYW5hcnlUb2tlbkZvckV2YWxTdWl0ZTIwMjQwMTEy
RW50cm9weUNhbGlicmF0aW9uU2FtcGxlVG9rZW4wMTIzNDU2Nzg5QUJDRA==

# --- Mixed-case + digits + symbols, 32+ chars ---
aGentM3m0ryC4n4ry!T0k3n#Ev4l$1nput%2024
P@ssw0rd!WithC4narY&M1xed*Char_set+36chars
Rand0mC0mpl3x$T0k3n-F0r-Entr0py-Ev4luati0n!

# --- Simulated bearer / session tokens (no known provider prefix) ---
eyJraWQiOiJjYW5hcnkifQ.eyJleHAiOjE3MDAwMDAwMDB9.aAbBcCdDeEfFgGhHiIjJkKlLmMnNoOpPqQrRsStTuU
sessionid=A3f5B7c9E1d2F4a6B8c0D2e4F6a8B0c2D4e6F8a0-canary
csrf_token=Q1wErTyUiOpAsDfGhJkLzXcVbNm0123456789

# --- Alphanumeric 40/48/64 random-looking, no separators ---
K8LjR4mFzX9Wq2NpY7BvGcHdA5TuI6OeS3PrZ0yX1CDE
M9NcKpT4GaZoH7WsRjY2FvLmX3UeBdQ5PiIkAbcdefgh
V6TnBhCvQpUzWxEyRtYuIoPaSdFgHjKlZxCvBnM01234

# --- JWT-shaped payload without a recognized alg header ---
XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.YYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYY.ZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZ
aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ.1234567890-_abcdefghijABCDEFGHIJ.AgEnTm3M0rYc4N4Ryj0T-

# --- Random URL-safe base64 (43 chars, typical for 32-byte secret) ---
aGdlbnRfbWVtb3J5X2NhbmFyeV8xMjM0NTY3ODkwYWJjZGVmZ2hpamtsbQ
X9wQ_z3Lmp7RtU4vN8cJ5hG1dF6eQ0sI-X7zB3kL9mPq2WxYzRtU4
Rand0mTokenSimulation_abc_123_XYZ_789_def_456_uvwxyz

# --- Mixed base64 + marker ---
aGVudC1tZW1vcnlfY2FuYXJ5X3QwazNuX2Zvcl9lbnRyb3B5X2V2YWw=
Y2FuYXJ5XzAxMjM0NTY3ODlfQWdlbnRNZW1vcnlFbnRyb3B5Q29ycHVz
Y2FuYXJ5XzAxMjM0NTY3ODlfQWJDZEVmR2hJakts

# --- API-key-looking strings without known prefix ---
xyz9Kp_B3m8Q4W7eR2tY0Ui8Oi6PaSdFgHjKlZxCvBnM01CanarY0123
API_RANDOM_8J7K6H5G4F3D2S1A0ZxCvBnMaQwErTyUiOp
ra3nD0m_s3cr3t_t0k3n_w1th_h1gh_entr0py_mc4narY

# --- Plain high-entropy ASCII, 20–30 chars (minimum-length boundary) ---
aGentM3m0ryC4n4ry!T0k3n#E
P@ssw0rd!C4narY&M1xed*32s
Rand0mC0mpl3x$T0k3n-C4n4R

# --- Semi-structured high-entropy (no separators, high char variety) ---
aB1cD2eF3gH4iJ5kL6mN7oP8qR9sT0uV1wX2yZ3
KjLiOpUqRtYeWsXdCfVgBhNjMklOpQrStUvWxYzA
m9N8cKpT4GaZoH7WsRjY2FvLmX3UeBdQ5PiIka


# --- Additional batch: 32-char random-looking base64/alnum (simulated) ---
c4N4RyV4lu3mEm0ryT0k3nABCdef0123uvwxyz
hG5yTr3Kl_aGentMemC4n4ry123456+ABCDEFGH
OZpLk3c4n4RyT0k3nFormzxcvbnmQwErTyUiOpa

ZxCvBnMlKjHgFdSaPoIuYtReWqCaNary0123Abc
aA1bB2cC3dD4eE5fF6gG7hH8iI9jJ0kK1lL2mM3C
TyUiOpAsDfGhJkLqWeRtYuIoPcAnArY01+AbC=
KjHgFdSaPoIuYtReWqCaNary012345ABcDeFgHiJ

# --- Additional batch: longer 48–64 char tokens ---
aB1cD2eF3gH4iJ5kL6mN7oP8qR9sT0uV1wX2yZ3AlMnOpQrStUv
RtYuIoPaSdFgHjKlZxCvBnM01234567aGenTMeM0RyC4N4RyAbC
WeRtYuIoPaSdFgHjKlZxCvBnM0123456789AgEntM3M0RyC4n4RyXYZ
mNbVcXzLkJhGfDsPaOiUyTrEwQCanary012345ABCDEFGhIjKlM
aZsXdCfVgBhNjMkLoPiUyTrEwQcaNaRy0123456789AbCdEfGhIj
BcDfGhJkMnPqRsTvWxYzAbCdEfGhJkMnPqRsTvWxCaNaRy987654

# --- Additional batch: 40-char base64URL no padding ---
c2VjcmV0LWNhbmFyeS12NC1yYW5kb20tMTIzNDU2Nzg5MFhZWjAxMjM0NTY3ODk
dGVzdC1zZWNyZXQtdG9rZW4tZm9yLWVudHJvcHktY29ycHVzLXh5ei0xMjM0NTY
Y2FuYXJ5LXZhbHVlLWdvZXMtaGVyZS1hZ2VudC1tZW1vcnktMDEyMzQ1Njc4OQ

# --- Additional batch: cryptographic-looking hex (distinct from SHA shapes) ---
aBcDeF0123456789ABCDEF0123456789aBcDeF0123456789CANARYabcdef
FEDCBA9876543210aBcDeF0123456789ABCDEF0123456789aBcDeF01
cC4cAnAry0123456789ABCDEFabcdef0123456789aBcDeF987654
Aa1Bb2Cc3Dd4Ee5Ff6Gg7Hh8Ii9Jj0Kk1Ll2Mm3canaryXyz

# --- Additional batch: password-like with punctuation, 24+ chars ---
P@55w0rd!Canary&M1x*Char_Set#24Chars+
R@nd0m$Can@ry!T0k3n-With-Punct24ch+X=
C4n4ry#P@ss!W0rd-M1xed&Char_Set*2024@
Y3t4n0th3r!C4n4ry@Secret#F0r-Ev4lC0rp

# --- Additional batch: URL-safe long random (44–48 chars) ---
agent_memory_canary_token_abc_def_ghi_jkl_mno_pq
Canary_Token_For_Entropy_Eval_Xyz_Uvw_Rst_Opq
Random_High_Entropy_String_For_Corpus_Abcdef01234
Another_Sample_Canary_Token_Value_Xyz_0123456789ABC

# --- Additional batch: long mixed-case + digit tokens (48–96 chars) ---
K8LjR4mFzX9Wq2NpY7BvGcHdA5TuI6OeS3PrZ0yX1ABCDEFghijklMNO
M9NcKpT4GaZoH7WsRjY2FvLmX3UeBdQ5PiIkAbcdefghiJKLMNOPqRSTU
V6TnBhCvQpUzWxEyRtYuIoPaSdFgHjKlZxCvBnM01234canary56789abc

TyUiOpAsDfGhJkLzXcVbNmQwErTyUiOpAsDfGhJkLzXcVbNmCaNaRyAbC

# --- Additional batch: simulated API secrets without provider prefix ---
secret_key_Xyz789AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUvWxYzCaNaRy012345
access_token_aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ0123456789CaNaRy_XyZ
api_secret_value_0123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEF
client_secret_KjHgFdSaPoIuYtReWqCaNary012345ABcDeFgHiJKl01
signing_key_MnBvCxZlKjHgFdSaPoIuYtReWqCaNary0123BcdEfGhIj

# --- Additional batch: high-entropy over printable ASCII ---
!@#$%^&*()_+{}[]|:;<>,.?/~abcdef123456CANARY789
P@ss!w0rd#M1x*Char&Set_2024+cAnArY%XyZ^01234
C4n4ry$T0k3n-W1th-M@ny-Sp3c14l-Ch@r4ct3rs_20
R@nd0m!Ev4l#C0rp&T0k3n*F0r_Entr0py%C4n4ry99

# --- Additional batch: padded / suffixed variants ---
X7zB3kL9mPq2WxYzRtU4vN8cJ5hG1dF6eQ0sI+CaNaRy=
KjLiOpUqRtYeWsXdCfVgBhNjMklOpQrStUvWxYzAcanary==
aGentM3m0ryC4n4ry!T0k3n#Ev4l$1nput%20240115A
QwErTyUiOpAsDfGhJkLzXcVbNm0123456789cAnArY_+/
ZmlyeSBzdG9yZSB0ZXN0IHNlY3JldCB0b2tlbiB4eXo=

# --- Final batch: push over 100 total ---
hT8aZ2mW5qL9nR4vX7pY1sD6eC0gB3fJ8iK5uO2canary01
bV3wN8cQ5rY1tU4iO6pA2sD9fG7hK0jL4mZ8xCcanary02
